name: ChatGPT
description: AI chatbot powered by GPT-4o that can understand and generate text, analyze images, and assist with coding, writing, and research.
longDescription: ChatGPT is OpenAI's flagship conversational AI, built on the GPT-4o model. It excels at natural language understanding, code generation, creative writing, data analysis, and multimodal tasks including image understanding. With over 200 million weekly active users, it's the most widely used AI assistant globally.

cons: Can hallucinate facts|Free tier has usage limits|Privacy concerns for sensitive data|Expensive API pricing at scale
